Frequency and Reporting in Relation to the Minimum Capital Requirement

rules.summary: A firm must calculate the MCR at least quarterly and report the results of that calculation to the PRA in accordance with the requirements laid down in [Reporting 2.1](/pra-rules/reporting#35c18
Where either of the limits referred to in 3.3 determines a firm’s MCR the firm must provide the PRA information
This Chapter applies to the Society.
In calculating the MCR for Lloyd’s, in the manner required by 3, the Society must ensure that the MCR is calibrated
The Society must determine, at least quarterly, the ratio of the Lloyd’s MCR to the Lloyd’s SCR and notify the PRA of the result at the same time it reports the quarterly MCR calculation req
The Society must calculate a reporting point for each underwriting member , in accordance with 5.5.
The reporting point for each underwriting member must be calculated using the ratio referred to in 5.3, expressed as
The Society must notify the PRA if own funds attributable to a member fall below the reporting point determined in accordance with [5.5](/pra-rules/minimum-capital-requirement#a9dcd70b666a439f
